title: Important Update to Clean Fuel Standard Rulemaking Timeline
content:
The Washington Department of Ecology is extending the timeline of the Clean Fuel Standard Rulemaking as the state legislature considers bills that could affect the program.

The proposal was scheduled to occur by mid-March, and weÂ now expect to file the proposal several weeks following the current legislative session, which is scheduled to end on April 27.
author: Mansift Kaur
